languages.text: "Чернь проще привести к повиновению. Они тупы, но выносливы и исполнительны. Послушание — вот твоя праведность!"
"Commoners are easier to bring to heel. They are dumb, but they are hardy and dutiful. Obedience is your righteousness!"
languages.original_text: "Чернь проще привести к повиновению. Они тупы, но выносливы и исполнительны. Послушание — вот твоя праведность!"

traits.locale_text: "Commoners are easier to bring to heel. They are dumb, but they are hardy and dutiful. Obedience is your righteousness!"
"Commoners are easier to bring to heel. They are dumb, but they are hardy and dutiful. Obedience is your righteousness!"
"Commoners are easier to bring to heel. They are dumb, but they are hardy and dutiful. Obedience is your righteousness!"

languages.text: 「庶民は従順にさせるのが容易だ。愚かだが、頑丈で忠実だ。従順こそが正義だ！」
languages.original_text: "Commoners are easier to bring to heel. They are dumb, but they are hardy and dutiful. Obedience is your righteousness!"

traits.locale_text: 「庶民は従順にさせるのが容易だ。愚かだが、頑丈で忠実だ。従順こそが正義だ！」

languages.text: “平民最容易驯服。他们愚钝，却吃苦耐劳，尽职尽责。服从，便是你的正义！”
languages.original_text: "Commoners are easier to bring to heel. They are dumb, but they are hardy and dutiful. Obedience is your righteousness!"

traits.locale_text: “平民最容易驯服。他们愚钝，却吃苦耐劳，尽职尽责。服从，便是你的正义！”

languages.text: «Es más fácil doblegar a los plebeyos. Son estúpidos, pero resistentes y diligentes. ¡La obediencia es virtud!».
languages.original_text: "Commoners are easier to bring to heel. They are dumb, but they are hardy and dutiful. Obedience is your righteousness!"

traits.locale_text: «Es más fácil doblegar a los plebeyos. Son estúpidos, pero resistentes y diligentes. ¡La obediencia es virtud!».

languages.text: "Einfache Leute sind einfacher gefügig zu machen. Sie sind dumm, gleichzeitig aber robust und pflichtbewusst. Gehorsam ist Eure Rechtschaffenheit."
languages.original_text: "Commoners are easier to bring to heel. They are dumb, but they are hardy and dutiful. Obedience is your righteousness!"

traits.locale_text: "Einfache Leute sind einfacher gefügig zu machen. Sie sind dumm, gleichzeitig aber robust und pflichtbewusst. Gehorsam ist Eure Rechtschaffenheit."

languages.text: « Il est plus facile de mettre au pas les gens du peuple. Ils sont stupides, mais robustes et dévoués. L'obéissance, voilà votre vertu ! »
languages.original_text: "Commoners are easier to bring to heel. They are dumb, but they are hardy and dutiful. Obedience is your righteousness!"

traits.locale_text: « Il est plus facile de mettre au pas les gens du peuple. Ils sont stupides, mais robustes et dévoués. L'obéissance, voilà votre vertu ! »

languages.text: "Sıradan insanları yola getirmek daha kolaydır. Aptaldırlar ama dayanıklı ve vazifelerine sadıktırlar. İtaat, doğruluktur!"
languages.original_text: "Commoners are easier to bring to heel. They are dumb, but they are hardy and dutiful. Obedience is your righteousness!"

traits.locale_text: "Sıradan insanları yola getirmek daha kolaydır. Aptaldırlar ama dayanıklı ve vazifelerine sadıktırlar. İtaat, doğruluktur!"
